hypothesis: If autonomous discovery agents use the pretrained MatterGen structure generator combined with a diversity-based acquisition function, then they will discover significantly more novel stable compounds (stability ≤ 0.01 eV/atom by ORB-v3 MLIP and novelty by StructureMatcher) within a 20-query budget than agents using a Random generator and/or random acquisition, with the advantage amplified when initialization is limited to elemental end-members.
